name: Randy Dunn
bio: Randy Dunn serves as the Mayor of Quitman, the county seat of Wood County. Quitman is a small East Texas community known for nearby Lake Fork, one of the premier bass fishing lakes in the nation. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to support the local economy.
campaignPromises: Capitalize on Lake Fork tourism for local economic growth
Support local businesses on the town square
Maintain affordable city services and low taxes
